mapper.select: SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_RCG_IDX1) */ A.SEQ, A.SUBSCRIBER_NO, NVL(DECODE(A.CONTRACT_NUM, 0, '', A.CONTRACT_NUM),'') CONTRACT_NUM, NVL(A.REQ_SRC,'') REQ_SRC, NVL(A.REQ_TYPE,'') REQ_TYPE, NVL(A.RECHARGE_INFO,'') RECHARGE_INFO, NVL(A.RECHARGE_METHOD,'') RECHARGE_METHOD, NVL(A.AMOUNT,0) AMOUNT, NVL(A.IN_AMOUNT,0) IN_AMOUNT, NVL(A.KT_RES_CODE,'') KT_RES_CODE, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.KT_RES_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),'') KT_RES_DT, NVL(A.ADMIN_ID, '') ADMIN_ID, NVL(F_GET_ADMIN_NM(A.ADMIN_ID),'') ADMIN_NM, NVL(A.RECHARGE_AGENT,'') RECHARGE_AGENT, NVL(F_GET_AGENT_NM(A.RECHARGE_AGENT),'') RECHARGE_AGENT_NAME, NVL(A.CHG_TYPE,'') CHG_TYPE, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_RCG','CHG_TYPE',CHG_TYPE),'') CHG_TYPE_NAME, NVL(A.CANCEL_FLAG,'') CANCEL_FLAG, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.CANCEL_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'') CANCEL_DT, NVL(A.BASIC_REMAINS,0) BASIC_REMAINS, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.RECHARGE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),'') RECHARGE_DATE, DECODE(A.CANCEL_FLAG, 'N', DECODE(A.KT_RES_CODE, '0000', '취소', ''), '') CANCEL_BTN, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.BASIC_EXPIRE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'') BASIC_EXPIRE, A.REMARK, A.FREE_FLAG, DECODE(A.FREE_FLAG,'N','판매', 'Y','수수료', '-') FREE_FLAG_NM , F_GET_AGENT_NM((SELECT AGENT_ID FROM PPS_CUSTOMER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM)) OPEN_AGENT_NM, (SELECT LST_COM_ACTV_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE FROM PPS_RCG A, (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, MIN(RECHARGE_DATE) RECHARGE_DATE FROM pps_rcg WHERE REQ_TYPE = 'CMS_RCG_VOICE' AND RECHARGE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{searchDate}, 'YYYYMM') AND RECHARGE_DATE < add_months(TO_DATE(#{searchDate},'yyyymm'), 1) AND KT_RES_CODE='0000' AND CANCEL_FLAG='N' AND CONTRACT_NUM NOT IN (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM PPS_RCG WHERE RECHARGE_DATE < TO_DATE(#{searchDate}, 'YYYYMM') AND REQ_TYPE = 'CMS_RCG_VOICE' AND KT_RES_CODE='0000' AND CANCEL_FLAG='N' ) GROUP BY CONTRACT_NUM ) B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.RECHARGE_DATE = B.RECHARGE_DATE

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_RCG_IDX1) */ A.SEQ, A.SUBSCRIBER_NO, NVL(DECODE(A.CONTRACT_NUM, 0, '', A.CONTRACT_NUM),'') CONTRACT_NUM, NVL(A.REQ_SRC,'') REQ_SRC, NVL(A.REQ_TYPE,'') REQ_TYPE, NVL(A.RECHARGE_INFO,'') RECHARGE_INFO, NVL(A.RECHARGE_METHOD,'') RECHARGE_METHOD, NVL(A.AMOUNT,0) AMOUNT, NVL(A.IN_AMOUNT,0) IN_AMOUNT, NVL(A.KT_RES_CODE,'') KT_RES_CODE, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.KT_RES_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),'') KT_RES_DT, NVL(A.ADMIN_ID, '') ADMIN_ID, NVL(F_GET_ADMIN_NM(A.ADMIN_ID),'') ADMIN_NM, NVL(A.RECHARGE_AGENT,'') RECHARGE_AGENT, NVL(F_GET_AGENT_NM(A.RECHARGE_AGENT),'') RECHARGE_AGENT_NAME, NVL(A.CHG_TYPE,'') CHG_TYPE, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_RCG','CHG_TYPE',CHG_TYPE),'') CHG_TYPE_NAME, NVL(A.CANCEL_FLAG,'') CANCEL_FLAG, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.CANCEL_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'') CANCEL_DT, NVL(A.BASIC_REMAINS,0) BASIC_REMAINS, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.RECHARGE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),'') RECHARGE_DATE, DECODE(A.CANCEL_FLAG, 'N', DECODE(A.KT_RES_CODE, '0000', '취소', ''), '') CANCEL_BTN, NVL(TO_CHAR(A.BASIC_EXPIRE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'') BASIC_EXPIRE, A.REMARK, A.FREE_FLAG, DECODE(A.FREE_FLAG,'N','판매', 'Y','수수료', '-') FREE_FLAG_NM , F_GET_AGENT_NM((SELECT AGENT_ID FROM PPS_CUSTOMER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM)) OPEN_AGENT_NM, (SELECT LST_COM_ACTV_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE FROM PPS_RCG A, (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, MIN(RECHARGE_DATE) RECHARGE_DATE FROM pps_rcg WHERE REQ_TYPE = 'CMS_RCG_VOICE' AND RECHARGE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{searchDate}, 'YYYYMM') AND RECHARGE_DATE < add_months(TO_DATE(#{searchDate},'yyyymm'), 1) AND KT_RES_CODE='0000' AND CANCEL_FLAG='N' AND CONTRACT_NUM NOT IN (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM PPS_RCG WHERE RECHARGE_DATE < TO_DATE(#{searchDate}, 'YYYYMM') AND REQ_TYPE = 'CMS_RCG_VOICE' AND KT_RES_CODE='0000' AND CANCEL_FLAG='N' ) GROUP BY CONTRACT_NUM ) B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.RECHARGE_DATE = B.RECHARGE_DATE

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_REAL_STATS_CDR_IDX)*/ CONTRACT_NUM, SUB_LINK_NAME, AD_NATION, DECODE(AD_NATION, '', '미등록', F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'AD_NATION', AD_NATION)) AD_NATION_NM, SOC, (SELECT RATE_NM SERVICE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = SOC and rownum = 1) AS SERVICE_NM, SUB_STATUS, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'SUB_STATUS', SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM, TO_CHAR(ENTER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ENTER_DATE, TO_CHAR(STATUS_STOP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') STATUS_STOP_DT, TO_CHAR(STATUS_CANCEL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') STATUS_CANCEL_DT, TO_CHAR(BASIC_EXPIRE , 'YYYY-MM-DD') BASIC_EXPIRE, MODEL_NAME, USE_TERM, TO_CHAR(LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT , 'YYYY-MM-DD') LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, AGENT_ID, F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_ID) AGENT_NM, NVL(AGENT_SALE_ID, '') AGENT_SALE_ID , F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_SALE_ID) AGENT_SALE_NM, DECODE(VIZA_FLAG, 'Y', 'Y', '') VIZA_FLAG, CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO', 'CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD', CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD) CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD_NM, BASIC_REMAINS, TRY_RCG_CNT, TRY_RCG_CHARGE, RCG_EDIT_CHARGE, RCG_FREE_CHARGE, RCG_PAY_CHARGE, RCG_FREE_CANCEL_CHARGE, RCG_PAY_CANCEL_CHARGE, TOT_RCG_CHARGE, USE_CNT, ROUND(USE_DUR, 2) USE_DUR, USE_CHARGE, ROUND(USE_PKT, 2) USE_PKT, ROUND(VOC_N_DUR, 2) VOC_N_DUR, VOC_N_CHARGE, ROUND(VOC_I_DUR, 2) VOC_I_DUR, VOC_I_CHARGE, SMS_N_CNT, SMS_N_CHARGE, SMS_I_CNT, SMS_I_CHARGE, ROUND(PKT_N_DUR, 2) PKT_N_DUR, PKT_N_CHARGE, PKT_N_CHARGE + PKT_I_CHARGE TOT_PKT_CHARGE, DAY_CNT, DAY_CHARGE, ETC_CNT, ETC_CHARGE FROM PPS_REAL_STATS_CDR A WHERE ENTER_DATE > TO_DATE('20140101', 'YYYYMMDD')
AND ENTER_DATE >= to_date(#{searchStartDt}, 'yyyymmdd')
AND ENTER_DATE < to_date(#{searchEndDt}, 'yyyymmdd')+1
AND STATUS_CANCEL_DT >= to_date(#{searchCancelDate} || '01', 'yyyymmdd') AND STATUS_CANCEL_DT < last_day(to_date(#{searchCancelDate}, 'yyyymm'))+1
AND (AGENT_SALE_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchAgentSale} || '%' OR AGENT_SALE_ID IN (SELECT ORGN_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_LVL_CD = '20' AND ORGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchAgentSale} || '%'))
AND SUB_STATUS = #{searchSubStatus}
AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId}

SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(A PPS_REAL_STATS_CDR_IDX)*/ NVL(CONTRACT_NUM, '-') CONTRACT_NUM, NVL(SUB_LINK_NAME, '-') SUB_LINK_NAME, NVL(AD_NATION, '-') AD_NATION, NVL(DECODE(AD_NATION, '', '미등록', F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'AD_NATION', AD_NATION)), '-') AD_NATION_NM, NVL(SOC, '-') SOC, NVL((SELECT RATE_NM SERVICE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = SOC and rownum = 1), '-') AS SERVICE_NM, NVL(SUB_STATUS, '-') SUB_STATUS, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_CUSTOMER', 'SUB_STATUS', SUB_STATUS), '-') AS SUB_STATUS_NM, NVL(TO_CHAR(ENTER_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') ENTER_DATE, NVL(TO_CHAR(STATUS_STOP_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') STATUS_STOP_DT, NVL(TO_CHAR(STATUS_CANCEL_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') STATUS_CANCEL_DT, NVL(TO_CHAR(BASIC_EXPIRE , 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') BASIC_EXPIRE, NVL(MODEL_NAME, '-') MODEL_NAME, NVL(USE_TERM, 0) USE_TERM, NVL(TO_CHAR(LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT , 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '-') LAST_BASIC_CHG_DT, NVL(AGENT_ID, '-') AGENT_ID, NVL(F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_ID), '-') AGENT_NM, NVL(AGENT_SALE_ID, '-') AGENT_SALE_ID , NVL(F_GET_AGENT_NM(AGENT_SALE_ID), '-') AGENT_SALE_NM, DECODE(VIZA_FLAG, 'Y', 'Y', '-') VIZA_FLAG, NVL(CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD, '-') CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD, NVL(F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO', 'CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD', CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD), '-') CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD_NM, NVL(BASIC_REMAINS, 0) BASIC_REMAINS, NVL(TRY_RCG_CNT, 0) TRY_RCG_CNT, NVL(TRY_RCG_CHARGE, 0) TRY_RCG_CHARGE, NVL(RCG_EDIT_CHARGE, 0) RCG_EDIT_CHARGE, NVL(RCG_FREE_CHARGE, 0) RCG_FREE_CHARGE, NVL(RCG_PAY_CHARGE, 0) RCG_PAY_CHARGE, NVL(RCG_FREE_CANCEL_CHARGE, 0) RCG_FREE_CANCEL_CHARGE, NVL(RCG_PAY_CANCEL_CHARGE, 0) RCG_PAY_CANCEL_CHARGE, NVL(TOT_RCG_CHARGE, 0) TOT_RCG_CHARGE, NVL(USE_CNT, 0) USE_CNT, NVL(ROUND(USE_DUR, 2), 0) USE_DUR, NVL(USE_CHARGE, 0) USE_CHARGE, NVL(ROUND(USE_PKT, 2), 0) USE_PKT, NVL(ROUND(VOC_N_DUR, 2), 0) VOC_N_DUR, NVL(VOC_N_CHARGE, 0) VOC_N_CHARGE, NVL(ROUND(VOC_I_DUR, 2), 0) VOC_I_DUR, NVL(VOC_I_CHARGE, 0) VOC_I_CHARGE, NVL(SMS_N_CNT, 0) SMS_N_CNT, NVL(SMS_N_CHARGE, 0) SMS_N_CHARGE, NVL(SMS_I_CNT, 0) SMS_I_CNT, NVL(SMS_I_CHARGE, 0) SMS_I_CHARGE, NVL(ROUND(PKT_N_DUR, 2), 0) PKT_N_DUR, NVL(PKT_N_CHARGE, 0) PKT_N_CHARGE, NVL(PKT_N_CHARGE, 0) + NVL(PKT_I_CHARGE, 0) TOT_PKT_CHARGE, NVL(DAY_CNT, 0) DAY_CNT, NVL(DAY_CHARGE, 0) DAY_CHARGE, NVL(ETC_CNT, 0) ETC_CNT, NVL(ETC_CHARGE, 0) ETC_CHARGE FROM PPS_REAL_STATS_CDR A WHERE ENTER_DATE > TO_DATE('20140101', 'YYYYMMDD')
AND ENTER_DATE >= to_date(#{searchStartDt}, 'yyyymmdd')
AND ENTER_DATE < to_date(#{searchEndDt}, 'yyyymmdd')+1
AND STATUS_CANCEL_DT >= to_date(#{searchCancelDate} || '01', 'yyyymmdd') AND STATUS_CANCEL_DT < last_day(to_date(#{searchCancelDate}, 'yyyymm'))+1
AND (AGENT_SALE_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchAgentSale} || '%' OR AGENT_SALE_ID IN (SELECT ORGN_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_LVL_CD = '20' AND ORGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchAgentSale} || '%'))
AND SUB_STATUS = #{searchSubStatus}
AND AGENT_ID = #{searchAgentId}
